nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires 18:00 UTC daily = 06:00 NZT next morning (UTC+12)

nodes.name: Run ETL Feed
nodes.notes: Runs 07_api_feed.py --live --live-apis. Calls Open-Meteo, Frankfurter, Overpass APIs. Writes payload_live.json to 07_reports/api_payloads/

nodes.name: Parse Payload
nodes.notes: Reads payload_live.json, extracts data_quality.health_score and all metadata. Passes structured data to IF node.

nodes.name: Health Score OK?
nodes.notes: True branch (output 0): health_score >= 80 — publish payload and log success. False branch (output 1): health_score < 80 — log QUALITY ALERT, do NOT overwrite good payload.

nodes.name: Log Success
nodes.notes: True branch: payload_live.json already written by python. This node appends a structured success line to etl_log.txt.

nodes.name: Log Quality Alert
nodes.notes: False branch: health_score < 80. Appends ETL QUALITY ALERT to etl_log.txt. Does NOT overwrite payload_live.json — retains last valid payload.
